resources.string: Google Play services are unavailable.
No purchases found. Are you using the right account?
Google Play Error
There was an error in Google Play. Please try again later or reboot your phone.\n\nError: %s
Google Play Billing Error
There was an error when asking Google Play for your purchase details. Clear Google Play cache and reboot your phone.\n\nError %s
Already purchased?

Google Play reports that you already own this upgrade, but it couldn\'t be restored. Make sure you are using the Google account you purchased with. Play Store synchronization may take time — try rebooting, clearing the Google Play cache or simply waiting.
Restore purchase
Pro
CAPod is developed by a single person. Upgrading unlocks extra features and helps keep the app alive.
Same features, different pricing. The subscription includes a free trial and can be cancelled at any time.
Same features, different pricing. The subscription can be cancelled at any time.
Start free trial
Subscribe yearly
%s/year
Buy once
One-time purchase: %s
Restore purchase
No purchases found. Are you using the right account?
If you\'ve recently purchased, it may take a moment for Google Play to sync.
Try again in a few minutes if your purchase doesn\'t appear.
Make sure you\'re signed in with the same Google account used for the purchase.
Multiple accounts can confuse Google Play. Installing the app through the Google Play website forces the association with a specific account.
Already bought Pro?
It looks like you upgraded to Pro on this device before. Restore your purchase to unlock it again.
Purchase restored.
Status looks wrong?
If you own an upgrade that isn\'t shown here, restore your purchase.
You have CAPod Pro!
Unlocked by your subscription. Thank you for supporting CAPod!
Unlocked by your one-time purchase. Thank you for supporting CAPod!
Yearly subscription
Your subscription is active and set to renew. Billing is managed by Google Play.
Your subscription is active, but not set to renew. Pro stays available until the current period ends.
One-time purchase
Yours forever. No renewals, no expiry.
You own the one-time purchase, but your subscription is still set to renew. Cancel it in Google Play to avoid paying twice.
Manage subscription
Switch to the one-time purchase
Available once your subscription is no longer set to renew. Cancel it in Google Play to switch.
This is a separate purchase — it does not cancel or refund your subscription. Use the same Google account.
Subscription still active
Your subscription is still set to renew. Cancel it in Google Play first, then switch to the one-time purchase. Just cancelled? Give Google Play a moment and try again.
Subscription check failed
Couldn\'t check your subscription status with Google Play. To avoid a double purchase, try again in a moment.
Confirming your purchase
Google Play hasn\'t confirmed your purchase yet. Pro is still active — no action needed.
Google Play hasn\'t confirmed your purchase for a while. Pro is still active. Make sure you\'re online and signed in with the Google account used for the purchase, then try restoring.
